items.name: Town Hall
items.description: The central civic hall that turns an occupied settlement into a paying stronghold.

items.name: Muster Yard
items.description: Levy yards that field the disciplined River Guard.

items.name: Watch Barracks
items.description: Professional barracks that deepen guard rotations and lower their levy cost.

items.name: Market Square
items.description: Trade stalls and weigh houses that turn every convoy into hard coin.

items.name: Wayfarers Hall
items.description: A hired-roads hall where spare captains wait for new contracts.

items.name: Bowyer Lodge
items.description: Bowyer workshops and firing lanes that train Ember Archers.

items.name: Beacon Range
items.description: Signal-fire ranges that expand archer musters and speed their issue.

items.name: Stone Store
items.description: Quarried stockpiles that keep the walls paid for and the guard lines reinforced.

items.name: Lantern Archive
items.description: Archive stacks where civic mages catalogue battle-tested field spells.

items.name: Starseer Annex
items.description: An expanded observatory annex that opens higher spell tiers to the town.

items.name: River Granary Exchange
items.description: Granary ledgers and bonded barges that turn full stores into convoy coin and steadier levy feed.

items.name: Quartermaster Depot
items.description: A depot of ferried kit, bowstrings, and ration books that lets Embercourt field cheaper, cleaner musters.

items.name: Signal Citadel
items.description: Citadel towers, beacon lenses, and horn relays that let the riverwardens concentrate archers and wall crews at once.

items.name: Citadel Pikehall
items.description: A drilled pike hall that fields veteran Pikewards to pin breaches under disciplined lantern command.

items.name: Charter Bastion
items.description: A basin-command bastion of ledgers, reserve horns, and beacon maps that turns Embercourt's main keep into a true campaign anchor.

capital_project.summary: The Charter Bastion can pour reserve columns onto the roads while its beacon net hardens the basin line.

items.name: Blackbranch Den
items.description: Hidden den-runs that arm and loose Blackbranch Cutthroats.

items.name: Reed Warren
items.description: Nested reed warrens that turn every den into a broader cutthroat reserve.

items.name: Mire Pens
items.description: Caged mirebeasts and brute handlers that unlock Bog Brutes.

items.name: Fenscale Pens
items.description: Expanded brute pits that raise larger weekly Bog Brute drafts.

items.name: Slingers Post
items.description: Mud-platform firing posts that train Mire Slingers.

items.name: Rot Warren
items.description: Spoor-fed missile warrens that widen slinger musters and issue gear faster.

items.name: War Drum Circle
items.description: Raised drum circles that coordinate marsh strikes and pull fast raiders toward the same breach.

items.name: Smugglers Flotilla
items.description: Hidden punts, chain-boom slips, and midnight brokers that turn captive channels into steady war spoils.

items.name: Floodtide Forge
items.description: Flood-quenched bog forges that harden brute kit, repair ferries, and turn brute pits into real assault musters.

items.name: Gorefen Ring
items.description: A blood-marked reed ring where pack-callers loose Gorefen Rippers once the prey line starts to buckle.

items.name: Nightglass Dominion
items.description: A covenant command ring of ferry chains, shrine drums, and kill-signals that turns the marsh capital into a campaign engine.

capital_project.summary: Nightglass Dominion keeps the ferry chains moving and lets the covenant sustain a deeper drum-led surge.

items.name: Shard Yard
items.description: Mirror-glass drill yards that field the disciplined Shard Guard.

items.name: Mirror Forge
items.description: Facet forges recut pavises and bucklers, deepening guard rotations and lowering their issue cost.

items.name: Prism Range
items.description: Tiered firing galleries where Prism Adepts learn to bend glare into killing lanes.

items.name: Lens Gallery
items.description: Expanded galleries and calibration halls that broaden adept musters and tighten their firing rhythms.

items.name: Duel Circle
items.description: Mirror-marked challenge courts where Duelists train to exploit broken timing and reflected lanes.

items.name: Resonant Exchange
items.description: Shard brokers, relay contracts, and lens merchants turn calibrated stock into coin and fresh crystal feed.

items.name: Harmonic Cloister
items.description: Choir cloisters and relay wards keep buff cycles running and stop the line from losing resonance under pressure.

items.name: Aurora Spire
items.description: A relay crown tower where the Compact can field Aurora Ballistae to dominate prepared sightlines.

items.name: Daybreak Matrix
items.description: A grand relay lattice of resonant plates and command lenses that lets Sunvault project a calibrated late-war push from its capital.

capital_project.summary: The Daybreak Matrix aligns Prismhearth's relays into a full-theater battery network for the final push.

items.name: Granary Lock Exchange
items.description: Bonded granaries and lock ledgers smooth low-tier musters for the river courts.

items.name: Tollstone Weir
items.description: Tollstone gates train lantern crews to turn crossings into prepared kill lanes.

items.name: Bargebow Slip
items.description: River slips house the heavy bargebow frames used to protect controlled channels.

items.name: Oath Pikehall
items.description: Ash-sealed court halls field bailiffs who enforce compact battle lines.

items.name: Beacon Court
items.description: Signal courts train lectors to read beacon law across the battlefield.

items.name: Drake Sluice
items.description: Lock-gated breeding sluices hold the dangerous Sluicefire Lindworms.

items.name: Charter Bastion
items.description: A court-bell bastion that frames the eventual Charter Colossus project.

items.name: Blackbranch Den
items.description: Drowned dens loose Reedsnare Kin into the ferry lanes.

items.name: Chainboom Ferry
items.description: Chain ferries and toll booms train lashers to pull clean lines apart.

items.name: War Drum Circle
items.description: Drum circles teach mudglass crews when to blind and when to break prey.

items.name: Sporewake Shrine
items.description: Rot-lit shrines call chanters who deny recovery and mark wounded prey.

items.name: Floodtide Forge
items.description: Flood-quenched forges plate the maulers for wet frontal assaults.

items.name: Nightglass Dominion
items.description: A black reedstone dominion that feeds elite Gorefen packs.

items.name: Antler Pit
items.description: A drowned antler pit for the covenant apex sovereign.

items.name: Shard Yard
items.description: Shard yards field shielded wardens for the first array line.

items.name: Lens Gallery
items.description: Lens galleries train prism adepts to fire down calibrated lanes.

items.name: Mirror Forge
items.description: Mirror forges cut dueling gear for reflected-lane assaults.

items.name: Harmonic Cloister
items.description: Choir cloisters prepare resonant choristers for array timing.

items.name: Zenith Observatory
items.description: Zenith instruments map solar stride routes and firing geometry.

items.name: Aurora Spire
items.description: Relay spires assemble the heavy Aurora Ballistae.

items.name: Daybreak Matrix
items.description: A grand matrix that carries the Daybreak Colossus blueprint.

items.name: Seed Vault
items.description: A traveling vault of seed law that arms the first Seedcutters.

items.name: Bramble Toll
items.description: Toll briars teach Thornwhip Carriers to bind and tax movement.

items.name: Sporeglass Hothouse
items.description: Warm seedglass houses raise menders for recovery work.

items.name: Barkmantle Run
items.description: Living siege runs train the slow Barkmantle Rams.

items.name: Pilgrim Orchard
items.description: Mobile orchard lanes breed Stag-Knot Runners for flanking pins.

items.name: Graftworks
items.description: Graft halls shape matriarchs who keep regrowth lines coherent.

items.name: Worldroot Gate
items.description: A root gate grown for the eventual Worldroot Bastion.

items.name: Ore Tithe Office
items.description: Audited ore tithe halls arm Scrip Haulers for contract service.

items.name: Rivet Kennels
items.description: Clockwork kennels loose Rivet Hounds against exposed seams.

items.name: Pavis Foundry
items.description: Foundries stamp furnace pavises for shield teams.

items.name: Boiler Cathedral
items.description: Furnace chapels consecrate Boiler Rivetcasters and heat rites.

items.name: Pressure Rail
items.description: Pressure rails move debt engines between foundry stages.

items.name: Crucible Dock
items.description: Slag docks assemble Crucible Crawlers for siege duty.

items.name: Titan Charter Hall
items.description: A contract hall that funds the Foundry Saint project.

items.name: Bell Harbor
items.description: Bell docks muster Bellwake Oars to screen the first fog lanes.

items.name: Ransom Exchange
items.description: Ransom desks fund Mourning Lantern crews through salvage and scouting.

items.name: Mirror Drydock
items.description: Mirror slips train corsairs to board from impossible angles.

items.name: Harpoon Gantry
items.description: High gantries field Undertow Harpooners for formation breaks.

items.name: Obituary Vault
items.description: Obituary vaults train scribes to mark and weaken the doomed.

items.name: Mistgate Slip
items.description: Mistgate slips prepare Mirror-Keel Reavers for phase raids.

items.name: Leviathan Sounding
items.description: Black-sail soundings call the Fogbound Leviathan from hidden water.
